real_entrypoint_evidence: test/helpers/cli-fixture.js defines cliPath as repoRoot/src/cli.js and runCliJson spawns process.execPath with [cliPath, ...args]. The passing command node --test test/clean-safety.test.js exercises the real src/cli.js entrypoint.
json_contract_evidence: test/clean-safety.test.js asserts clean JSON envelopes include ok, command=clean, status, projectRoot, configPath, dryRun, mode, targets, removed, and stable failure error.code values including confirmation_required, clean_target_root, clean_target_outside_project, and clean_target_ambiguous.
